blog_title: T-Shirt Wash Care Label & Size Tag — Why 1000 Printed Tees Got Returned Over a ₹6 Tag
caption:
1000 t-shirts rejected. ₹1.5 lakh lost. All because of a missing ₹6 tag 💀

A printer shipped bulk tees without wash-care labels or size tags. Client said no — unsellable. That ₹6 tag? Costs ₹5-8 per piece. Skip it, lose the whole margin.

Your math: ₹140 blank + ₹18 print + ₹6 tag = ₹164 landed. Safe. Without the tag? Rejected shipment + return freight.

Save this if you're sourcing your next bulk order 👇
